untranslatable_reason: The signal requires a 10-day moving average of an up/down volume ratio with channel normalization (30-day lookback). The available indicator 'vol_ratio_20' is a 20-day volume ratio without the specified 10-day MA wrapper or channel normalization capability. The exact calculation of 'up/down volume ratio' and its 10-day MA with dynamic channel thresholds cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to map the concept using vol_ratio_20, but this is an imperfect substitute. The signal's core logic (mean reversion based on extreme volume ratios) is captured in the entry/exit structure, but without access to: (1) a 10-day MA of up/down volume ratio, (2) channel normalization based on 30-day volatility regime, and (3) dynamic threshold adaptation. A proper implementation would require custom indicator calculation or a more granular volume ratio indicator.
